note: Evidence-bound claims over the multi-target map. The subject-interior claim is HELD under thin evidence with live alternatives; motive/soul-state is out of scope. Every evidence_id resolves to NOETIC-EVIDENCE-REGISTRY.example.json.

claims.proposition: the utterance imports an illicit source-order criterion at its surface reading
claims.support_rule: structural-surface-reading: a public-wording structural feature licenses an asserted discourse-level claim
defeaters: a disambiguating restatement by the author
non_claims: asserts nothing about the speaker's interior, motive, or soul-state

claims.proposition: a candidate criterion-import defect best fits the subject's placement under A
claims.support_rule: about-bridge-thin: subject-level evidence is only ABOUT the subject via an observation bridge; thin evidence licenses a HELD placement with live alternatives, never an asserted settled interior

uncertainty.basis: one wording feature; several subject-level profiles remain live

defeaters: a discriminating observation separating the candidate profiles
non_claims: the bridge evidence does not establish the interior state as true, sufficient, or uniquely identified

claims.proposition: the subject's motive/culpability is not adjudicated
claims.support_rule: interior-humility: motive/culpability/soul-state is normally OUT OF SCOPE absent extraordinary independent evidence

uncertainty.basis: no interior access is available or claimed

non_claims: no motive or culpability verdict is asserted or implied

claims.proposition: the runtime control field closed after whole-state reread
claims.support_rule: runtime-closure-only: a reread trace evidences runtime closure and nothing about the subject's actual condition
non_claims: runtime closure is not demonstrated interior restoration
asserts nothing about m_subject's actual condition
